WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – DROP LPN AFTER PICKING

## **DROP LOADED LPN AFTER PICKING**

Once the Pick Tasks have been completed and the LPNs are loaded, these LPNs can be dropped into the Line Locators in the Config Department.

![](_page_0_Picture_5.jpeg)

Please ensure that you are logged into the mobile printer to enable printing of the Pick-Drop Label

- **Step 1:** Using the Mobile Application, navigate to 'Picking'-> 'Drop Loaded LPNs'
- **Step 2:** Enter the correct Organization and press 'Enter' on the keypad
- **Step 3:** In the 'Current Tasks' field, scan the LPN and click on 'Drop'

![](_page_0_Picture_10.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Figure_11.jpeg)

If the items & quantities are correct, you can proceed with dropping the LPN by scanning the Config Line Locator that is shown on your scangun and select the 'Done' button.

A 'Task Complete' message will be displayed at the bottom of the screen.

![](_page_0_Picture_14.jpeg)

The LPN is now dropped into the Config Line Locator, ready for the (Re)Configuration process.

![](_page_0_Figure_16.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Figure_17.jpeg)
